markets.question: Ja'Kobe Walter: Assists O/U 0.5
markets.description:

This market will resolve to "No" if Ja'Kobe Walter records 0.5 assists or fewer during the game.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Eastern Conference first-round series between the Cleveland Cavaliers and Toronto Raptors stands tied 3-3 after Toronto's dramatic 112-110 overtime victory in Game 6 on May 1 at Scotiabank Arena, capped by RJ Barrett's bouncing three-pointer and fueled by Scottie Barnes' 25 points and 14 assists despite missing Brandon Ingram (right heel inflammation). Raptors guard Immanuel Quickley remains out with a right hamstring strain, missing the entire postseason, while Ingram is day-to-day ahead of Game 7 on May 3 at Rocket Mortgage FieldHouse. Cavaliers report no injuries, boasting full health with Donovan Mitchell and Evan Mobley available, leveraging home-court advantage and superior depth in this resilient matchup where upsets remain possible given Toronto's grit.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Detroit Pistons forced a decisive Game 7 with a dominant 93-79 road victory over the Orlando Magic in Game 6 on May 1, erasing a 24-point deficit—the largest in postseason elimination history—forcing Orlando to score just eight points in the fourth quarter. Cade Cunningham powered the rally with 32 points, 10 rebounds, and four steals, building momentum from his 45-point Game 5 outburst as Detroit staved off elimination twice. Magic forward Franz Wagner remains sidelined by a right calf strain, missing Games 5 and 6 and thinning Orlando's scoring options alongside questionable Jonathan Isaac (knee). Game 7 shifts to Little Caesars Arena, where the top-seeded Pistons hold home-court advantage in this Eastern Conference first-round clash, amplifying Cade's playoff form and Detroit's recent resilience against Paolo Banchero-led Magic pressure.

markets.question: Will "Bully - Ye" be the Billboard 200 #1 album for the week of May 9?
markets.description:
Billboard updates the Billboard 200 albums chart each Tuesday (with adjusted release schedules on some holiday weeks), reflecting data from the previous week (Friday-Thursday). Each Billboard chart is then dated “Week of (date of the upcoming Saturday)”.

This market will resolve according to the number 1 album on the Billboard 200 chart dated “Week of May 9, 2026”.

This market will resolve as soon as the relevant chart is published. If the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week is not published within 14 calendar days of the expected release date, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week, published on the Billboard website (https://www.billboard.com/charts/billboard-200/) or through other official Billboard channels.

markets.question: Will the lowest temperature in Miami be between 82-83°F on May 4?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the lowest temperature recorded at the Miami Intl Airport Station in degrees Fahrenheit on 4 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the lowest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Miami Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/fl/miami/KMIA.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

events.description:

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

eventMetadata.context_description: National Weather Service guidance and ensemble forecast models like GFS and ECMWF project Miami International Airport's lowest temperature on May 4 around 73-76°F, fueling the tight trader consensus with 72-73°F, 74-75°F, and 76-77°F bins each at 50.5% implied probability amid minor 2-3°F spreads. Southerly winds around 5-10 mph and partly cloudy skies limit radiative cooling, holding lows above climatological early-May norms of 72°F while urban heat island effects at the airport add warmth. Recent 24-hour updates show stable high pressure dominating, with no major disruptions like fronts or heavy rain. Key differentiators include potential overnight cloud variability trapping heat versus clearer skies allowing dips to 72°F; watch afternoon NWS revisions and 12z model runs for shifts before resolution.

markets.question: Map 2: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 2 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 2 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 2, or if Map 2 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Imperial Academy vs Infinite (BO3) - United21 Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Upper bracket quarterfinal 1 match between Imperial Academy and Infinite in the United21 Playoffs, initially scheduled for April 9 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Imperial Academy" if Imperial Academy win the match against Infinite.

This market will resolve to "Infinite" if Infinite win the match against Imperial Academy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Imperial Academy enters the United21 Season 47 playoffs upper bracket quarterfinal with momentum from a perfect 2-0 group stage run in Group A, defeating LPH Gaming 2-1 and Sangal ALTERS 2-0 on maps including Inferno, Dust II, and Ancient, showcasing strong CT-side holds. Infinite advanced as Group D runners-up with a 2-1 record, bouncing back from a 0-2 loss to Misa Esports via stand-ins like Blytz and marTineZ replacing Dytor, but their roster instability—featuring subs SHiPZ and fnl—raises questions on consistency against Imperial's stable lineup of ta9z, sh1Fu, Kragh, aZe, and hyskeee. In this Bo3 matchup, map vetoes and adaptation to the meta will be pivotal, with HLTV rankings favoring Infinite at #65 over Imperial Academy's #224, yet recent form suggests a competitive scrap in the double-elimination bracket.

markets.question: US x Iran permanent peace deal by May 31, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if Iran and the United states agree to a permanent peace deal by the specified date, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”. 

A permanent peace deal refers to any agreement which explicitly indicates that military hostilities between the United States and Iran have ended or will permanently cease, or uses equivalent language clearly signaling a lasting end to military hostilities between the United States and Iran. Agreements that are explicitly temporary or which do not include a definitive agreement to end military hostilities between the US and Iran on a lasting basis (e.g. a temporary extension of the two-week ceasefire agreement announced on April 7, 2026), will not qualify.

A qualifying agreement will be considered to have been established if either of the following conditions are met:

- The United States and Iran each sign or formally adopt a written agreement (e.g. a treaty or multi-point agreement) which meets the above criteria.

- Both the governments of the United States and Iran provide clear public confirmation that a qualifying agreement has been definitively established. Negotiations, statements of progress, or other statements which do not constitute a definitive announcement that a qualifying agreement has been reached will not count.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the governments of the United States and Iran; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Amid a fragile ceasefire brokered by Pakistan after recent US-Iran hostilities, indirect diplomacy persists without progress toward a permanent peace deal. Iran's May 1 proposal—reopening the Strait of Hormuz for US blockade relief while postponing nuclear curbs—drew President Trump's rejection as unsatisfactory, highlighting gaps on sanctions, ballistic missiles, and regional proxies. Prior Islamabad talks collapsed in April amid hardliner pressures, with multiple extensions averting escalation but underscoring mistrust. Traders assess low odds reflecting Iran's alliances with US adversaries and historical JCPOA failures, eyeing potential resumption in Pakistan, War Powers Act deadlines, and congressional oversight as pivotal catalysts.

eventMetadata.context_description: Palmeiras sit atop the Serie A table with 25 points from 10 matches, bolstered by a five-match winning streak capped by a 2-1 victory over Bahia on April 5, showcasing strong home form at Allianz Parque ahead of their May 2 derby clash with rivals Santos. Key absences loom: Palmeiras without left-back Joaquín Piquerez (ankle surgery, out until late May) and possibly Vitor Roque (ankle), while Santos manages Neymar's post-procedure recovery and load management amid his suspension fallout. Historical edge favors Palmeiras (21-15-10 H2H), though derbies breed upsets in this table-defining fixture.

markets.question: Will Baltimore Orioles win the 2026 AL East title?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the team that wins the 2026 MLB American League East division.

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve according to the official winner as determined by MLB rules. If multiple winners are announced then this market will resolve to the team whose listed nickname comes first alphabetically.

If at any point it becomes impossible for a listed team to be named the 2026 American League East division champion per the rules of the MLB (e.g., they are eliminated in the playoffs), the corresponding market will resolve to “No”.

If the 2026 MLB regular season is cancelled, postponed after October 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from Major League Baseball (https://www.mlb.com/); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Will ByteDance have the #2 AI model at the end of June 2026 (Style Control On)?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company that owns the model that has the second-highest arena rank (Style Control On) based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on June 30, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control on will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies second place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

markets.description:
Billboard updates the Billboard 200 albums chart each Tuesday (with adjusted release schedules on some holiday weeks), reflecting data from the previous week (Friday-Thursday). Each Billboard chart is then dated “Week of (date of the upcoming Saturday)”.

This market will resolve according to the number 1 album on the Billboard 200 chart dated “Week of May 9, 2026”.

This market will resolve as soon as the relevant chart is published. If the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week is not published within 14 calendar days of the expected release date, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week, published on the Billboard website (https://www.billboard.com/charts/billboard-200/) or through other official Billboard channels.

markets.question: Will annual inflation increase by 4.0% in April?
markets.description:
This is a market about inflation over the 12-month period ending April 2026, before seasonal adjustment, as reported by the Bureau of Labor Statistics.

This market will resolve to the percentage change in the Consumer Price Index (CPI) over the 12-month period ending in April 2026 according to the monthly Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) report.

The resolution source for this market will be the BLS Consumer Price Index report released for April 2026 (https://www.bls.gov/bls/news-release/cpi.htm), currently scheduled to be released on May 12, 2026, at 8:30 AM ET. Resolution of this market will take place upon release of the aforementioned data.

Note: the resolution source for this market will be the official monthly BLS CPI news release, which reports inflation over 12-month periods to only one decimal point (e.g., 2.9%). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

If the BLS does not release the relevant figures on the scheduled date, this market may remain open up until the scheduled release time of the next CPI report (https://www.bls.gov/schedule). If the information is not released by that time, this market will resolve according to the figures of the most recent previous month with available data.

markets.question: Will Discord’s market cap be $30B or greater at market close on IPO day?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on Discord's market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.

If no IPO occurs by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "No IPO by June 30, 2026".

Market capitalization expresses the monetary value of a company’s outstanding shares, stated in its pricing currency. It is calculated as the number of shares outstanding multiplied by the closing share price on the first trading day.

If the relevant value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Resolution will be based on the primary exchange’s official listing page. In the event that the relevant figure is not displayed, another reliable source will be used.

In the event of an interruption in the course of the normal trading session on Discord’s first day of trading (e.g., a circuit breaker or half-day), the market will resolve according to the official closing price of the abbreviated session. If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that as the first day of trading for purposes of this market.

Secondary market trading, such as Forge Global's March estimate of $7.23 billion enterprise value and Hiive's $40.78 per-share level as of late April, signals a potential downround from the 2021 $15 billion peak amid monetization challenges—despite 200 million monthly users and roughly $600 million in annual revenue—amid softer tech valuations and competitive pressures in digital communications. A <15 billion market cap outcome at 15.6% gains traction from these depressed pre-IPO share prices, with key catalysts including any S-1 disclosure or Q2 economic data influencing IPO windows.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

markets.question: Will gemini-3-pro have the best AI model on May 8, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the model that has the highest arena rank based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on the specified date, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control off will be used to resolve this market.

No new model will be added to this market after market creation. Any model not explicitly listed in this market will be encompassed under the "Other" option.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie still remains, alphabetical order of model names as listed in this market group (full string, including suffixes such as “-thinking”) will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if two models remain tied, “claude-opus-4-6” would be ranked ahead of “claude-opus-4-6-thinking”). This market will resolve to the model that comes first according to this order.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

An official acquisition announcement prior to the market’s close date will immediately resolve this market to the corresponding option.

The primary resolution sources for this market will be official announcements from the Milwaukee Bucks and/or the acquiring team. A consensus of credible media reporting may also be used to resolve the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Harry Kane holds a commanding 15-goal lead in the Bundesliga top goalscorer race with 33 strikes in 28 appearances for champions Bayern Munich, far outpacing VfB Stuttgart's Deniz Undav on 18 and the tied Luis Díaz and Serhou Guirassy on 15 each. This trader consensus at 99.5% implied probability reflects Kane's sustained dominance, including goals in recent matchday 31 victory over Mainz and his third straight campaign topping the charts amid Bayern's title retention four games early. With only three matchdays left and Bayern facing lighter fixtures, challengers face insurmountable math barring a catastrophic Kane injury and freakish scoring runs from pursuers like Michael Olise or Patrik Schick.

markets.question: Map 1: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 1, or if Map 1 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Spirit Academy vs Wave Esports (BO3) - Exort Series Main Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Round 1 match between Spirit Academy and Wave Esports in the Exort Series Main Stage, initially scheduled for April 16 at 11:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Spirit Academy" if Spirit Academy win the match against Wave Esports.

This market will resolve to "Wave Esports" if Wave Esports win the match against Spirit Academy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Spirit Academy, academy affiliate of top-ranked Team Spirit, entered Exort Series #25 Main Stage undefeated from qualifiers, leveraging organizational depth and stable lineup post-February roster refresh with VILBy, mazay, and kidofpain. They faced #149-ranked Wave Esports in Round 1 BO3 swiss, where Wave scraped 3-1 through contenders but showed mixed form (37.5% win rate past three months) amid March overhauls adding Katalic, sheezy, miksozzz, and Belof. Trader consensus favored Spirit's superior talent pool and map versatility on Dust2, Mirage, Inferno against Wave's stand-in disruptions and elimination risks in the $10k C-tier online EU event's high-stakes format.

NEC's recent 3-2 upset victory over league leaders PSV underscores their strong momentum and top-four push, bolstered by solid home form and a dominant head-to-head record (7 wins to Telstar's 2, including a 2-2 draw earlier this season at Telstar). markets.question: Will Anthropic have the second best AI model at the end of June 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company that owns the model with the second-highest arena rank based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on June 30, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control off will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies second place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Lucknow be 34°C or below on May 3?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Chaudhary Charan Singh Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 3 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Chaudhary Charan Singh Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/in/lucknow/VILK.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader sentiment clusters around 34–37°C outcomes, with 36°C leading at 27.5% implied probability, reflecting the India Meteorological Department's latest local forecast for Lucknow Airport pegging May 3 maximum at 35°C under mainly clear skies turning partly cloudy by evening. Recent 3 mm rainfall over the past 24 hours cooled observed highs to 31.7–34°C on April 30–May 1, well below May's climatological average of ~40°C, due to elevated soil moisture and cloud-induced suppression of daytime solar heating. Differentiating factors include afternoon cloud development timing—persistent cover favors 34–35°C via reduced insolation, while earlier clearing boosts to 36–37°C—and light easterly winds maintaining moderate humidity (60–40%). IMD's May 2026 outlook anticipates cooler days with above-normal rainfall across northern India, amplifying uncertainty; fresh observational updates expected today could shift model consensus before resolution.

markets.question: Will Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) hit (HIGH) $6.50 in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during May 2026, any 1-minute candle for Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) has a final "High" price equal to or above the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) "High" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily high price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

eventMetadata.context_description: The CFTC's March 12, 2026, advisory outlines heightened standards for Designated Contract Markets (DCMs) to self-certify sports event contracts via Regulation 40.2 filings, urging pre-certification engagement with leagues like MLB—now formalized via MOU—official data settlement, and enhanced manipulation surveillance using league partnerships and audit trails. Federal courts, including a recent Third Circuit ruling, affirmed CFTC preemption over state gambling laws for DCM-listed swaps, boosting viability. ANPRM comments closed April 30 with industry calls for federal uniformity; no new sports self-certifications emerged in the past 30 days despite prior filings by Kalshi and others totaling thousands. Traders monitor major DCMs like CME for filings before June 30 amid prediction market growth.

markets.question: Will Elon Musk post 140-159 tweets in May 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times Elon Musk (@elonmusk), posts on X during the month of May 2026.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies on the main feed such as https://x.com/elonmusk/status/1786073478711353576 will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

Community reposts which are not counted by the tracker not count toward the total.

The resolution source for this market is the 'Post Counter' figure for posts found at https://xtracker.polymarket.com. Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, X itself may be used as a secondary resolution source.

markets.question: Will Encore Medical’s market cap be between $50M and $55M at market close on IPO day?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on Encore Medical’s market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.

As of market creation, the IPO is scheduled to price on April 22 (ET). If no such IPO occurs by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "No IPO before June 2026".

Market capitalization expresses the monetary value of a company’s outstanding shares, stated in its pricing currency.

It is calculated as the total number of outstanding shares, multiplied by the official closing share price of the publicly traded class on the first trading day.

If necessary, to accurately capture the company’s total market capitalization, rather than a stock-class-specific market capitalization, the calculation will include all outstanding share classes and apply any stated conversion ratios to the publicly traded class. Where no conversion right exists, such shares will be counted at their stated outstanding amount without discount, unless official filings explicitly specify differently.

The number of outstanding shares will be determined from official company filings or disclosures (e.g., SEC filings). The closing share price on the first trading day will be determined from the primary exchange’s official listing page.

If the relevant value falls exactly between two brackets, this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official company filings and the primary exchange’s official listing page. The market capitalization will be determined through appropriate calculation using the total outstanding shares and the closing price from the first day of trading.

In the event of an interruption in the normal trading session on the specified company’s first day of trading (e.g., a circuit breaker or half-day), the market will resolve according to the official closing price of the abbreviated session. If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that day as the first day of trading for the purposes of this market.

markets.question: Will Meta have the second best AI model at the end of May 2026?
markets.description:

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control off will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Hartsfield-Jackson International Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/ga/atlanta/KATL.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket has locked in 64-65°F at 100% implied probability for Atlanta's highest temperature on May 1, driven by official observations from the National Weather Service's Automated Surface Observing System (ASOS) at Hartsfield-Jackson Atlanta International Airport (KATL), recording a peak of 65°F around 4 PM. A cold frontal passage late April 30 introduced a deep layer of cool, stable air—dew points in the 40s°F—and persistent cloud cover with light rain sharply limited solar insolation, preventing typical springtime heating. This outcome is 14°F below the early May climatological normal of 79°F. Realistic challenges are minimal, limited to rare post hoc data revisions from quality control audits, with final NWS climate summary expected to confirm shortly.

markets.question: Iran agrees to end enrichment of uranium by May 31?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Iran publicly agrees to end all enrichment of uranium by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

An official pledge by Iran to end all enrichment of Uranium will qualify for a “Yes” resolution whether as a unilateral announcement or part of an agreement with the U.S. or Israel.

Any agreement or pledge made before the resolution date of this market will qualify, regardless of if/when the agreement goes into effect.

An agreement by Iran to end all enrichment of uranium for any amount of time will count.

An agreement by Iran to end all enrichment of uranium as a precondition of a more comprehensive peace process or deal will qualify, even if the agreement is not finalized or part of a formalized peace deal. 

Agreements to merely limit or cap the level or quality of enrichment—such as reducing enrichment to below weapons-grade thresholds—will not qualify.

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

Trader consensus reflects PSG's squad depth, allowing youth like Ibrahim Mbaye, Elyaz Zidane, and potential debutant Renato Marin alongside Bradley Barcola to feature, while key absences like Achraf Hakimi (thigh) are mitigated. Lorient's 11.5% underdog pricing accounts for their mixed recent form—wins over Marseille but losses to Lyon—and resilience in head-to-heads, unbeaten in three of the last four Ligue 1 meetings with PSG (one win, two draws), boosting draw odds to 16.5%; injuries to Laurent Abergel (ankle) and Montassar Talbi (calf) limit their upset potential.

markets.question: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $70,000 on May 7?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) on the date specified in the title has a final "Close" price higher than the price specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT "Close" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT with "1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

Price precision is determined by the number of decimal places in the source.

markets.question: Will both candidates advancing to the general election for Governor of California from the June 2, 2026 primary be affiliated with the Republican Party?
markets.description:
The non-partisan primary election for Governor of California is scheduled to take place on June 2, 2026. The top two candidates in this election by number of votes won will advance to the general election for Governor of California.

This market will resolve according to the party affiliation of the listed candidates who advance from the primary to the general election for Governor of California. A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with a party.

In case any combination of parties advances that is not listed here, including all scenarios where an independent candidate advances, this market will resolve to "Other".

If no 2026 California gubernatorial primary takes place by December 31, 2026, this market will resolve to “Other.”

This market will resolve based on the results of the primary election for Governor of California as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the government of California, specifically the Office of the Secretary of State.

eventMetadata.context_description: In California's top-two primary on June 2, 2026, where the two highest vote-getters advance regardless of party, trader consensus heavily favors a Democrat-Republican matchup at 75% implied probability due to a fragmented Democratic field splitting votes among candidates like Tom Steyer, Xavier Becerra, and Katie Porter. Recent Emerson (April 14-15) and CBS/YouGov (April 23-27) polls of likely voters show Republican Steve Hilton leading at 16-17%, with Chad Bianco at 10-14% and Democrats close behind amid 23-26% undecideds, boosted by Eric Swalwell's mid-April withdrawal consolidating some Democratic support. Dem-Dem odds at 14.5% reflect consolidation risks, while Rep-Rep at 3.6% underscores Democratic voter plurality barriers despite GOP momentum from debates and Trump's Hilton endorsement.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices Ciro Gomes as the frontrunner at 51.5% implied probability to win the Ceará gubernatorial election, propelled by the April 30 Quaest poll showing him leading first-round voting intentions at 41% against incumbent Governor Elmano de Freitas (PT) at 32%, with Eduardo Girão (Novo) at 4%. This builds on prior surveys like Paraná Pesquisas (late March) and Futura Inteligência (early April), where Ciro dominates runoff matchups versus Elmano by double digits. Roberto Cláudio's 16.6% reflects consolidation among center-right voters, while Girão's 13.7% captures conservative support amid fragmentation. Elmano's 29.5% trails despite high approval ratings, signaling challenger momentum. The October 4 first-round vote—with runoff possible October 25—leaves room for shifts via new polls or campaign events.

markets.question: Will Anas Sarwar be the next First Minister of Scotland following the 2026 Scottish parliamentary elections?
markets.description:
Parliamentary elections are scheduled to be held in Scotland on May 7, 2026.

This market will resolve to the individual who is formally appointed as First Minister of Scotland following the 2026 Scottish parliamentary elections.

To count for resolution, the individual must be formally appointed as First Minister following the 2026 Scottish parliamentary elections. Any interim or caretaker head of government will not count toward the resolution of this market.

If no such First Minister is appointed by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the Government of Scotland; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

events.title: Next First Minister of Scotland?
events.description:

This market will resolve to the individual who is formally appointed as First Minister of Scotland following the 2026 Scottish parliamentary elections.

To count for resolution, the individual must be formally appointed as First Minister following the 2026 Scottish parliamentary elections. Any interim or caretaker head of government will not count toward the resolution of this market.

If no such First Minister is appointed by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the Government of Scotland; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors John Swinney as next First Minister at 96.5%, driven by consistent polling ahead of the May 7, 2026, Scottish Parliament election showing the SNP poised to remain the largest party in Holyrood. Recent MRP surveys from YouGov, More in Common, and Electoral Calculus project the SNP winning 60-70 seats—enough for Swinney's re-election through a parliamentary confidence vote, likely via minority government or Green support, mirroring his current arrangement. Campaign momentum includes Swinney's election launch and independence referendum pledges, amid fragmented opposition with Labour trailing. Upsets could arise from late scandals, voter turnout shifts, or improbable anti-SNP coalitions, though historical precedents favor incumbency stability.

markets.question: Will Sweetgreen (SG) beat quarterly earnings?
markets.description:
As of market creation, Sweetgreen is estimated to release earnings on May 7, 2026. The Street consensus estimate for Sweetgreen's GAAP EPS for the relevant quarter is $-0.23 as of market creation. This market will resolve to "Yes" if Sweetgreen reports GAAP EPS greater than $-0.23 for the relevant quarter in its next quarterly earnings release. Otherwise, it will resolve to "No." The resolution source will be the GAAP EPS listed in the company’s official earnings documents. 

If Sweetgreen releases earnings without GAAP EPS, then the market will resolve according to the GAAP EPS figure reported by SeekingAlpha. If no such figure is published within 96h of market close (4:00:00pm ET) on the day earnings are announced, the market will resolve to “No”.

If the company does not release earnings within 45 calendar days of the estimated earnings date, this market will resolve to “No.” 

Note: Subsequent restatements, corrections, or revisions made to the initially announced GAAP EPS figure will not qualify for resolution, except in the case of obvious and immediate mistakes (e.g., fat finger errors, as with Lyft's (LYFT) earnings release in February 2024).
Note: The strike prices used in these markets are derived from SeekingAlpha estimates, and reflect the consensus of sell-side analyst estimates for GAAP EPS. 
Note: All figures will be rounded to the nearest cent using standard rounding.
Note: For the purposes of this market, IFRS EPS will be treated as GAAP EPS.
Note: For the purposes of this market, GAAP EPS refers to diluted GAAP EPS, unless this is not published, in which case it refers to basic GAAP EPS.
Note: All figures are expressed in USD, unless otherwise indicated.
Note: For primarily internationally listed companies, this market refers specifically to the shares traded in the United States on U.S. stock exchanges such as the NYSE or Nasdaq. In cases where the company trades in the U.S. through an American Depositary Receipt (ADR) or American Depositary Share (ADS), this market will refer to the ADR/ADS.

Key drivers include ongoing Infinite Kitchen deployments in new stores boosting efficiency and digital sales at 65% of revenue, post-year-end Spyce sale proceeds of $186 million strengthening the balance sheet, and a modest FY2026 outlook with restaurant-level profit margins of 14.2–14.7%. Recent analyst estimate stability and lowered expectations set a low bar ahead of the May 7 release, though persistent SSS weakness poses risks to outperformance.

markets.question: Will Arouca qualify for the League Phase of the 2026-27 UEFA Conference League?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed team clinches a league phase spot in the 2026-27 Conference League per UEFA rules. Otherwise, the associated market will resolve to "No".

If at any point it becomes impossible for the listed team to clinch a league phase spot in the 2026-27 Conference League (e.g. they cannot mathematically achieve a Conference League place, cannot qualify through play in European or cup competitions, etc.), the associated market will resolve to "No". 

If the 2025-26 Primeira Liga season is cancelled, postponed after August 31, 2026 11:59 PM ET, or the teams that qualified for the 2026-27 Conference League have not been officially confirmed by UEFA within that timeframe, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market will be official information from UEFA and/or the Primeira Liga; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Will Ron DeSantis join the Trump administration by June 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Donald Trump officially nominates or appoints Ron DeSantis to his administration between market creation and June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The Trump administration includes individuals formally appointed or nominated by Donald Trump to roles within the U.S. federal government, such as Cabinet members, Executive Office staff, senior policy advisors, ambassadors, or White House staff whose appointments are publicly announced by official government channels.

Nominations will qualify even if the individual is not confirmed.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the US government; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

events.title: Will Ron DeSantis join the Trump administration by June 30?
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Donald Trump officially nominates or appoints Ron DeSantis to his administration between market creation and June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The Trump administration includes individuals formally appointed or nominated by Donald Trump to roles within the U.S. federal government, such as Cabinet members, Executive Office staff, senior policy advisors, ambassadors, or White House staff whose appointments are publicly announced by official government channels.

Nominations will qualify even if the individual is not confirmed.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the US government; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Florida Governor Ron DeSantis, term-limited out of office in January 2027, faces slim odds of joining the Trump administration by June 30 amid unconfirmed rumors rather than official actions. Recent Axios reporting on April 21 cited sources claiming DeSantis is seeking high-profile roles like Attorney General, Secretary of Defense, or even a Supreme Court seat, prompting Trump to tell reporters on May 1 that he "likes him a lot" and would consider a cabinet spot. However, no nomination, resignation announcement, or formal discussions have materialized in the past week, with DeSantis remaining focused on state duties. Traders' strong 86% No consensus reflects the tight two-month window, historical patterns of early-term cabinet fillings, and absence of momentum for a mid-governorship exit.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Istanbul be 14°C on May 2?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded by NOAA at the Istanbul Airport in degrees Celsius on 2 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from NOAA, specifically the highest reading under the "Temp" column on the specified date once information is finalized for all hours on that date, available here: https://www.weather.gov/wrh/timeseries?site=LTFM

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the "Switch to Metric Units" button until the relevant table displays °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket heavily favors 12°C (48%) over 11°C (39.5%) for Istanbul's highest temperature today, reflecting uncertainty in short-range forecasts amid a cold snap ushering northerly winds from the Balkans and Black Sea region, as reported by the Turkish State Meteorological Service (MGM). Ensemble guidance from ECMWF and GFS models shows a tight spread of 10-13°C, driven by persistent cloud cover and showers limiting solar insolation and diurnal warming—key differentiators between outcomes. Current observations indicate a cool morning start around 8-10°C under overcast skies, with light rain possible; any brief clearing could push toward 12-13°C, while heavier precipitation favors 11°C or lower. Watch MGM hourly updates and afternoon model refreshes for shifts before resolution based on official station data.

markets.question: Will US crude oil reserves fall to 325M by June 5?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the U.S. Energy Information Administration publishes a weekly figure for U.S. Ending Stocks of Crude Oil in the Strategic Petroleum Reserve less than or equal to the specified value for any week ending on or before June 5, 2026. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve as soon as the listed value is reached, or once data has been released for the final week ending on or before June 5, 2026, and the listed value has not been reached.

If data has not been released for the final week ending on or before June 5 2026, by June 12, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve based on the data available at that time.

The primary resolution source for this market will be the U.S. Energy Information Administration, specifically the weekly data published for the U.S. Ending Stocks of Crude Oil in the Strategic Petroleum Reserve at https://www.eia.gov/dnav/pet/hist/LeafHandler.ashx?n=PET&s=WCSSTUS1&f=W.

Note: this market’s resolution source publishes weekly values of U.S. Ending Stocks of Crude Oil in the Strategic Petroleum Reserve in thousands of barrels. Thus, this will be the level of specificity used to resolve this market.

eventMetadata.context_description: **US commercial crude oil inventories stand at 459.5 million barrels, about 1% above the five-year average, following recent builds of 3.1 million barrels in the week ended April 3 and another 6.1 million the following week, driven by elevated imports, robust domestic production averaging over 13.5 million barrels per day, and lingering refinery maintenance.** These unexpected increases contrast with high oil prices—Brent averaging $103 per barrel in March, forecasted to peak at $115 in Q2—fueled by Strait of Hormuz disruptions and European sanctions boosting US exports. OPEC+ approved a modest 206,000 barrels per day output hike for May on April 5, adding supply pressure. Traders eye weekly EIA Petroleum Status Reports, released Wednesdays, for potential draws as refinery utilization climbs into summer driving season, with the June 5 report resolving the market based on that week's commercial stocks excluding the Strategic Petroleum Reserve.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus prices a New York City FC win at 56.5% implied probability for their Eastern Conference MLS clash against D.C. United at Yankee Stadium, driven by home advantage and a dominant head-to-head record, including a 3-1 victory in their last meeting. Both sides sit mid-table on 3-3-4 records after 10 matches—NYCFC 7th, D.C. United 10th—separated by goal difference, with NYCFC aiming to snap a recent league winless run following an Open Cup triumph over rivals New York Red Bulls. D.C. markets.question: Will Renan Santos finish in second place in the first round of the 2026 Brazilian presidential election?
markets.description:
A presidential election is scheduled to take place in Brazil on October 4, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the listed candidate who receives the second-most valid votes in the first round of this election.

The named candidates will be primarily ranked by the number of valid votes received in the specified election. If two or more candidates are tied on valid votes, ties will be broken by alphabetical order of the candidates' last names. This market will resolve to the candidate that occupies the second-highest finishing position after applying this ranking.

If the result of this election isn't known definitively by June 30, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors Senator Flávio Bolsonaro at 66% implied probability for second place in Brazil's October 4 presidential election first round, reflecting consistent polling where he trails only incumbent President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva. Late April surveys, including AtlasIntel (22-27 April: Lula 47%, Flávio 40%) and Nexus (24-26 April: Lula 41%, Flávio 36%), show Flávio consolidating right-wing votes, far ahead of rivals like Renan Santos (5%), Ronaldo Caiado (3%), and Romeu Zema (3%). Lula leads below the 50%+1 majority threshold, positioning Flávio for a likely runoff on October 25. His rise stems from the Bolsonaro family brand and absorption of support after Tarcísio de Freitas opted for São Paulo gubernatorial re-election, amid tightening polls signaling a competitive race.

markets.question: Bill Clinton divorce by June 30?

Despite periodic tabloid speculation and revivals of historical controversies like Epstein associations or past infidelity claims—such as former advisor Dick Morris recounting old polling on divorce impacts—Hillary and Bill Clinton have consistently presented a united front publicly, prioritizing shared legacies and financial interests. With under two months remaining, barriers include their advanced ages, lack of catalysts, and institutional privacy norms; only a sudden health crisis, explosive new revelations, or unilateral declaration could shift odds dramatically.

events.title: Chungcheongnam Province Governor Election Winner
events.description:
The Chungcheongnam Province gubernatorial election is scheduled to take place in South Korea on June 3, 2026 to elect the next governor of Chungcheongnam Province. 

This market will resolve according to the candidate that wins this election.

If the result of this election isn't known by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the South Korean government, specifically the National Election Commission (https://www.nec.go.kr/).

eventMetadata.context_description: Democratic Party candidate Park Soo-hyun commands 92.4% implied probability as Chungcheongnam Province governor frontrunner ahead of the June 3 local elections, reflecting trader consensus on his dominant polling lead over incumbent People Power Party's Kim Tae-heum (2.4%). Recent KBS and TJB surveys show Park ahead 44%-23% and 42%-29%, respectively, fueled by his April 15 primary win over former governor Yang Seung-jo and pledges for AI-driven growth and regional integration with Daejeon. Strong Democratic support in the province, incumbency fatigue, and no major challengers solidify his position. Upsets could arise from scandals, a national swing favoring PPP, late campaign gaffes, or shifts in undecided voters during final debates.

markets.question: Will the lowest temperature in Hong Kong be 17°C on April 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the lowest temperature recorded by the Hong Kong Observatory in degrees Celsius on 30 Apr '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from the Hong Kong Observatory, specifically the "Absolute Daily Min (deg. C)" the specified date once information is finalized in the relevant "Daily Extract", available here: https://www.weather.gov.hk/en/cis/climat.htm

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures in Celsius to one decimal place (eg, 9.1°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

markets.question: Gamba Ōsaka vs. Vissel Kōbe: O/U 4.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming J1 100 Year Vision League game between Gamba Ōsaka and Vissel Kōbe, scheduled for May 2 at 2:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Gamba Ōsaka and Vissel Kōbe combine to score 5 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 5, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on jleague.jp. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Gamba Ōsaka vs. Vissel Kōbe - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the J1 100 Year Vision League game, scheduled for May 2 at 2:00 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Gamba Osaka and Vissel Kobe sit near the top of the J1 League table, with Gamba climbing to second after a 2-0 home win over Kyoto Sanga on April 4, showcasing strong defensive form at Panasonic Stadium Suita ahead of their May 2 hosting duties. Vissel Kobe preserved their lead with a 2-0 clean-sheet victory against Shimizu S-Pulse on April 1, extending recent momentum from a competitive 2-2 draw versus Gamba on March 18. Key absences loom large—Gamba without forward Takashi Usami (hamstring) and striker Asahi Uenaka (knee), Vissel missing goalkeeper Shota Arai (cruciate ligament, return post-match) and center-back Takuya Iwanami (collarbone)—potentially tilting stylistic matchups in this tight title race contest.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Latest ECMWF and GFS model ensembles drive trader consensus toward 24°C (42.5% implied probability) as Milan's highest temperature on May 3, with 23°C (28.5%) and 25°C (19%) close behind, reflecting peak daytime heating under a high-pressure ridge promoting subsidence aloft and light southwesterly winds of 5-8 km/h. Recent observations from May 1-2 recorded highs near 21-25°C amid sunny intervals, aligning with forecasts of partly cloudy skies and minimal precipitation risk, allowing strong solar insolation on typical spring Po Valley conditions. Ensemble spread introduces uncertainty around cloud development or minor wind shifts, with new 12Z model runs expected overnight potentially refining probabilities ahead of resolution based on official Milan station data.

markets.question: Will Pablo Lopez win the 2026 AL Cy Young Award?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the player who wins the 2026 American League Cy Young Award.

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve according to the official winner as determined by MLB rules. If multiple winners are announced then this market will resolve to the player whose listed last name comes first alphabetically.

If the 2026 MLB season is cancelled, postponed after December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from Major League Baseball; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

events.description:

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on the 2026 AL Cy Young reflects early-season volatility with Tarik Skubal's defending champion form challenged by breakout arms, as top probabilities cluster tightly amid small-sample stats through late April. Skubal (DET) leads implied odds at 21.5% with a 2.70 ERA, 0.95 WHIP, and 45 strikeouts over seven starts, but rookies like Parker Messick (CLE, 1.76 ERA highlighted by a no-hitter into the ninth versus Baltimore) and Cam Schlittler (NYY, 1.51 ERA, 0.74 WHIP, 49 Ks including six scoreless against Texas three days ago) have surged via dominant outings. Bryce Miller (SEA) sits close despite an oblique IL stint, buoyed by prior rotation stability, while Jose Soriano (LAA) boasts a microscopic 0.24 ERA early. Full-season workload, innings limits for prospects, and rotation health will dictate separation in this wide-open race.

eventMetadata.context_description: Albacete Balompié hosts relegation-battling Cultural y Deportiva Leonesa in LaLiga 2 on May 9 at Estadio Carlos Belmonte, with trader consensus likely favoring the mid-table hosts due to home advantage and Leonesa's dismal form. Leonesa sit 22nd after recent defeats, including 2-1 at Mirandés on April 26, 1-2 home loss to Córdoba on April 18, and 1-0 at Granada on April 12, leaving them desperate for points in a must-win survival push amid their 8-8-20 record. Albacete, 13th in the table, lost 0-3 at Eibar on April 24 but won 4-1 versus Granada prior, showing attacking threat at home. Head-to-head history tilts toward Leonesa with two prior wins and three draws, though low-scoring (0.8 goals average); no major injuries reported, but long-term absences like Albacete's Antonio Puertas persist. Late-season stakes heighten upset potential for the visitors.

markets.question: O/U 2.5 Rounds
markets.description:
Each market will resolve to “Over” if the fight between Themba Gorimbo and Jonathan Micallef at UFC Fight Night: Della Maddalena vs. Prates, scheduled for May 2, 2026, lasts beyond the listed round threshold.

Each market will resolve to “Under” if the fight between Themba Gorimbo and Jonathan Micallef at UFC Fight Night: Della Maddalena vs. Prates, scheduled for May 2, 2026, does not last beyond the listed round threshold.

For example:

“Over 2.5 Rounds” will resolve “Yes” if the fight continues past the 2:30 mark of Round 3.

“Under 2.5 Rounds” will resolve “Yes” if the fight ends before the 2:30 mark of Round 3.

If the fight ends exactly at the threshold (e.g., 2:30 of Round 3 for a 2.5 line), it will resolve “50-50.”

If the bout is not scored, postponed beyond May 16, 2026, or canceled, all options will resolve “50-50.”

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the UFC.

events.title: UFC Fight Night: Themba Gorimbo vs. Jonathan Micallef (Welterweight, Prelims)
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Themba Gorimbo" if Themba Gorimbo is officially declared the winner of the fight against Jonathan Micallef at UFC Fight Night: Della Maddalena vs. Prates, scheduled for May 2, 2026.

It will resolve to "Jonathan Micallef" if Jonathan Micallef is officially declared the winner.

If the fight is declared a draw or technical draw, ruled a No Contest, not scored, canceled, or postponed beyond May 16, 2026, this market will resolve "50-50."

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the UFC.

eventMetadata.context_description: Jonathan Micallef enters this welterweight prelim as trader consensus favorite, boasting a perfect 9-1 record and 2-0 UFC mark capped by a dramatic second-round technical submission (rear-naked choke) over Oban Elliott at UFC 325 in January 2026, showcasing his grappling prowess on a four-fight win streak. Themba Gorimbo (14-6), meanwhile, seeks to snap a career-first back-to-back losses, including a 52-second submission defeat, testing his resilience amid vulnerability to submissions. Both made weight cleanly yesterday—Micallef at 170 lbs, Gorimbo at 171—with no injury reports or withdrawals. In Perth's RAC Arena, hometown support bolsters Micallef's stylistic edge in wrestling and finishes against Gorimbo's power punching, though upsets remain possible in UFC's unpredictable landscape.

markets.question: Will Jared Kushner attend the next US x Iran diplomatic meeting?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed individual attends the next diplomatic meeting between representatives of the United States and Iran by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

A diplomatic meeting refers to a deliberate meeting between representatives of the listed countries who are acting in an official capacity and are authorized to engage in negotiation or diplomacy regarding US-Iranian relations on behalf of their governments. Meetings conducted indirectly, for example, through designated mediators, facilitators, or interlocutors acting with the knowledge and authorization of the relevant governments, will qualify.

Brief greetings, chance encounters, or talks otherwise not deliberately aimed at diplomacy or negotiation will not qualify as diplomatic meetings.

The meeting must be in-person (including indirect in-person meetings) and must be publicly acknowledged by either government or reported by a consensus of credible media. Remote meetings, phone calls, or other meetings where the relevant parties are not present will not count.

Attendance refers to the listed individual being physically present and actively participating in negotiations at the meeting.

If the next diplomatic meeting between representatives of the United States and Iran takes place over multiple days, attendance at any part of the meeting will qualify.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the listed individual and the governments of the United States and Iran; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Following the inconclusive direct US-Iran talks in Islamabad on April 11, 2026—led by Vice President JD Vance for the US alongside envoys like Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner, and Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi with Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf—traders monitor fragile ceasefire extensions amid Strait of Hormuz blockades and nuclear sticking points. Plans for a follow-up meeting around April 27 collapsed after President Trump canceled US delegations citing Tehran infighting, shifting to phone diplomacy and backchannels via Pakistan's Sharif and Oman. Iran floated an interim Hormuz reopening proposal, under White House review, heightening uncertainty over venue, timing, and attendees for the next bilateral negotiations. Regional tours by Araghchi signal de-escalation potential despite rhetoric.

eventMetadata.context_description: Michael B. Jordan's Best Actor Oscar win for his dual roles in "Sinners" has surged his market-implied odds to 16.6%, edging out Bad Bunny at 16.0% amid the Puerto Rican superstar's sustained crossover appeal from music tours and fashion campaigns. Timothée Chalamet lingers close at 13.5%, buoyed by persistent tabloid buzz from his Kylie Jenner romance and "Marty Supreme" visibility despite the awards loss. Rising "Heated Rivalry" co-stars Connor Storrie and Hudson Williams tie at 9.5%, propelled by viral GQ photo shoots, pre-Golden Globes party hype, and fervent Gen Z fan pushes on social media. In this fragmented field below 20%, traders balance Hollywood prestige, global pop culture dominance, and fresh "it boy" virality, with summer releases and promo cycles poised as key swing factors ahead of November's announcement.

markets.question: Will Anže Logar be the next Prime Minister of Slovenia?
markets.description:
Parliamentary elections are scheduled to be held in Slovenia on March 22, 2026.

This market will resolve to the next individual who is officially elected by the National Assembly (Državni zbor) and sworn in as Prime Minister of Slovenia following the next parliamentary election.

To count for resolution, the individual must be formally sworn in. Any interim or caretaker Prime Minister will not count toward the resolution of this market.

If no such Prime Minister is sworn in by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the Government of Slovenia; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Following March 2026 parliamentary elections that left Slovenia's 90-seat National Assembly fragmented—with Robert Golob's Freedom Movement at 29 seats and Janez Janša's SDS at 28—outgoing Prime Minister Golob conceded coalition failure on April 20, prompting President Nataša Pirc Musar to defer nominating a prime minister-designate. Trader consensus at 91.8% for Janša reflects the right bloc's commanding April 29 vote (49-4) passing SDS-proposed cuts to ministries from 19 to 14, signaling secured majority support from SDS, New Slovenia (NSi), and allies exceeding the 46-vote threshold for a confidence vote. Realistic challenges include the president's unexpected alternative nomination, such as NSi leader Jernej Vrtovec, coalition fractures amid policy disputes, or ongoing court challenges to the assembly speaker election, though momentum favors Janša's confirmation by late May.

eventMetadata.context_description: Bayern Munich hold a commanding 12-point lead atop the Bundesliga table after 29 matches, with Heidenheim mired in the relegation zone on 19 points from four wins, facing a must-win survival battle away at the Allianz Arena. Bayern's dominance is underscored by recent 4-0 head-to-head routs and superior home form, though trader consensus reflects caution amid a mounting injury list—Serge Gnabry sidelined long-term by an adductor tear, joined by Lennart Karl (hamstring) and others—thinning attacking depth during a congested schedule featuring Champions League semis against PSG. Heidenheim contend without key forwards Sirlord Conteh (knee) and Mikkel Kaufmann (calf), amplifying Bayern's stylistic edge despite rotation risks.

markets.question: Will xAI have the best AI model at the end of June 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company which owns the model which has the highest arena rank based off the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on June 30, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" section on the Leaderboard tab of https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with the style control off will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies first place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

eventMetadata.context_description: Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.7, released mid-April 2026, has propelled the company to a commanding 69.6% implied probability of holding the top AI model spot by June's end, dominating benchmarks like LMSYS Code Arena, Vals Index, and SWE-Bench Verified with massive gains in agentic coding and reasoning—up 37 Elo points over its predecessor and far ahead of rivals. Google trails at 22.5% on Gemini 3.1 Pro's strong but secondary showings across multimodal tasks, bolstered by competitive Elo proximity in Stanford's March AI Index. OpenAI's GPT-5.4 variants lag due to underwhelming recent gains, while trader sentiment anticipates potential shifts from Google's I/O announcements May 19-20 or surprise releases, though Anthropic's rapid iteration pace defines the consensus.
